agent.name: Sarah Mitchell
agent.notable_actions: Proactively quantified savings ($80/month vs 4 individual Premium plans); disclosed 3-stream concurrent limit before customer asked; logged parental control feedback; completed plan switch in-call with clear billing explanation

resolution.summary: Plan switched from Premium to Family ($39.99) effective immediately. Customer fully informed on all features, profile independence, content ratings, device sync, and 3-stream concurrent limit. Three additional profiles to be created by family members via app. Customer satisfied.

key_moments.description: Customer approves value: '$10 more for three extra people. That's actually decent value.'
key_moments.trigger: Price comparison clearly favourable vs multiple individual plans

key_moments.description: Customer raises parental controls concern for 14-year-old daughter
key_moments.trigger: Parental content concern for teen profiles

key_moments.description: Agent acknowledges parental controls gap and logs feedback; customer accepts
key_moments.trigger: Agent transparent about limitation; customer pragmatic

key_moments.description: Customer decides: 'Alright, let's switch me to Family. Can you do that now?'
key_moments.trigger: All questions resolved; decision made with confidence

key_moments.description: Customer closes: 'Great. Thanks Sarah, this was easy.'
key_moments.trigger: Friction-free upgrade experience; all concerns addressed

pain_points.description: No proper parental content control system for teen profiles. Agent confirmed manual per-profile 18+ filter exists but no set-once parental lock. Customer requested a proper parental controls feature.
pain_points.verbatim_quote: Be nice if there was a proper parental control system. Like, set it once and done.

motivations.description: Family expanding app use: wife (pilates), son 16 (boxing/HIIT), daughter 14 (pilates), account holder (weights/cycling). Family plan solves recommendation contamination and provides independent profiles.
Family plan at $39.99 vs four individual Premiums at $119.96 — $80/month saving is the primary financial motivator.

feature_requests.feature: Parental content controls (set-once, per-profile age restriction)
feature_requests.existing_workaround: Manual 18+ filter in each profile settings

intent.primary: Upgrade from Premium to Family plan to add wife and two teenage children to account
intent.secondary: Ensure each family member has independent profiles with appropriate content settings

signals: Upsell already completed in-call — Premium to Family

action_items.action: Switch account from Premium to Family — completed in-call with prorated billing explained
Log parental content controls as product feature request — completed in-call
Customer to add three family profiles via Settings > Family Profiles > Add Profile in app
